info.description:
This is a fully physically realistic, high-precision, and real-time KN spacetime renderer based on general relativity. 
Please refer to Buffer A for operation methods and parameter adjustments.
这是一个完全物理真实、高精度且实时的KN时空渲染，基于广义相对论。
请详见Buffer A以了解操作方式、参数调整等。
